text: I feel a curious tension between the ethereal, almost otherworldly glow of the first room and the cerebral energy of the second. The violet illumination in the glass room calls forth a sense of alienation, of looking into a space that is familiar and yet distinctly unnatural. The R+D wall and philosophical text in the next image deliver an intellectual challenge: I am reminded to question the ordinary, to consider the ways technology and thought mingle. Here, I am both an observer and a participant—invited to both marvel and reflect, suspended between wonder and analysis.
